use_cases: Toggle boolean settings on and off in configuration panels
Enable or disable features and preferences in application settings
Switch between dark and light mode in theme toggles
Control notification preferences and alert settings
Toggle visibility or availability of optional functionality
ai_summary: A smooth, animated toggle switch component with spring physics for the knob movement. Features a clean minimalist design with accent color state indication and responsive sizing. Built with Framer Motion for fluid, elastic animations when toggling between on and off states.
